ksa_text: Ability to perform systems analysis and assessments, analyzing system capabilities, architecture, and technical characteristics across complex environments.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5537, domain TF, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
